label: Accuracy
description: Checks whether your answer is truthful and grounded in what you know.
guidingQuestion: Did I avoid guessing or inventing details?

label: Conciseness
description: Checks whether your answer gives enough information without overexplaining.
guidingQuestion: Did I answer directly without adding unnecessary details?

label: Tone
description: Checks whether your answer sounds calm, respectful, and appropriate for the situation.
guidingQuestion: Did I avoid sounding defensive, casual, or emotional in the wrong setting?

label: Clarification
description: Checks whether you asked for clarification when the question was unclear.
guidingQuestion: Did I ask for clarification instead of guessing?

label: No Unnecessary Information
description: Checks whether you avoided volunteering information that was not asked for.
guidingQuestion: Did I avoid giving extra details that could confuse the situation?

label: Situation Fit
description: Checks whether your wording fits the setting and level of formality.
guidingQuestion: Does my answer match the seriousness of the situation?

label: Safe Phrasing
description: Checks whether you used clear, careful, and non-escalating language.
guidingQuestion: Did I use wording that is clear without sounding evasive or confrontational?
